privileged_info_summary: Verified that the 5 post-mortem tiddler entries are synthetically generated and dynamically injected via setup_task.sh. Confirmed that the expected dashboard title ('Post-Mortem Dashboard'), tag ('Dashboard'), list filter target ('PostMortem'), button label ('Create New Post-Mortem'), and scaffold requirements (title 'New Post-Mortem Report', tags 'PostMortem' and 'Draft', fields 'incident_date' and 'severity', and headings '!! Summary', '!! Root Cause', '!! Resolution') all strictly match the task instructions and verifier.py logic.
